summary: HOL-REDUNDANCY assessment: Eclipse/Chapman redundancy is mostly addressed — Section 4.2 is the canonical hub, Section 6.7 needs a minor tightening patch (point 2 re-derives non-discrimination argument; proposed replacement uses cross-ref instead). Aetheric refraction consolidation is already complete (Section 7.11 correctly references Section 1.5 as hub). Remaining eclipse spokes tracked as EXP-145 (WIN-010) and EXP-146 (SEC-6.2). Other redundancy clusters (Sydney-Perth, 95.2%, relabeling, tidal WINs) deferred to separate EXPs. Actionable patch: one paragraph replacement in Section 6.7.
